parameters.query:
INSERT INTO scraping_jobs (
  user_id,
  source,
  scraper_type,
  search_query,
  location,
  max_results,
  status,
  requested_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  'yellow_pages',
  'yellow_pages',
  '{{ $json.query }}',
  '{{ $json.location }}',
  {{ $json.max_results }},
  'processing',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id as job_id

UPDATE scraping_jobs
SET 
  status = 'completed',
  total_leads = {{ $json.total_inserted }},
  completed_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.job_id }}

parameters.responseBody:
=={
  success: true,
  job_id: $json.job_id,
  scraper: 'yellow_pages',
  total_leads: $json.total_inserted,
  message: 'Yellow Pages scraping completed successfully'
}
